---
title: 'Julian Treasure: The 4 ways sound affects us | Talk Video | TED.com'
date: '2014-11-04T05:53:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4154349204895711530'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/julian-treasure-4-ways-sound-affects-us_3.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
  - 'Research'
---

<div dir="ltr"><br /><br /></div><br /><div dir="ltr"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="talk-description" lang="en"><br />Playing sound effects both pleasant and awful, Julian Treasure shows how<br /> sound affects us in four significant ways. Listen carefully for a <br />shocking fact about noisy open-plan offices.<br /></div><br /><div dir="ltr"><br /><br /></div><br /><div dir="ltr"><br /><br /></div><br /><div dir="ltr"><br /><a href="http://www.ted.com/talks/julian_treasure_the_4_ways_sound_affects_us?language=en">http://www.ted.com/talks/julian_treasure_the_4_ways_sound_affects_us?language=en</a></div><br /><div dir="ltr"><br />DarrellWolfe.com via Mobile</div><br />
